assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: The response recommends REGULAR release channel, not STABLE or Extended channel as expected for minimizing upgrade frequency

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: The response shows maintenance exclusions with 'scope: NO_UPGRADES' to block all upgrades during critical training periods

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: The response configures a 4-hour maintenance window on Sundays (weekend) from 2-6 AM UTC for predictable timing

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: The response explicitly creates separate node pools: 'h100-training-pool' for training workloads and 'system-pool' for system workloads with different configurations

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: The response sets 'autoUpgrade: false' for the training node pool and recommends manual control over training nodes with scheduled maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: The response includes checkpoint configuration with persistent storage volumes and mentions 'Checkpoint Strategy: Use both local SSD for speed and persistent storage for durability'

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: While the response mentions GPU driver configuration with 'gpuDriverVersion: LATEST', it does not specifically advise testing driver versions in staging before production deployment

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GPUDirect/RDMA networking requirements or version compatibility considerations for upgrades
